markdownRemark.html:
Awesome asyncio

A carefully curated list of awesome Python asyncio frameworks, libraries, software and resources.

The Python asyncio module introduced to the standard library with Python 3.4 provides infrastructure for writing single-threaded concurrent code using coroutines, multiplexing I/O access over sockets and other resources, running network clients and servers, and other related primitives.

Asyncio is not really a brand-new technology however it appears to be very trending since a few years - especially in the Python community and with the release of Python 3.4 in March 2014. Thus, it's pretty hard to keep yourself up-to-date with the most awesome packages out there. Find some of those awesome packages here and if you are missing one we count on you to create an Issue or a Pull Request with your suggestion.

  • Web Frameworks
  • Message Queues

Web Frameworks

Libraries to build web applications.

  • aiohttpstars11.2k - Http client/server for asyncio (PEP-3156).
  • sanicstars14.9k - Python 3.5+ web server that's written to go fast.
  • Quart - An asyncio web microframework with the same API as Flask.
  • Viborastars5.7k - Performant web framework inspired by Flask.
  • cirrinastars30 - Opinionated asynchronous web framework based on aiohttp.
  • autobahnstars2.3k - WebSocket and WAMP supporting asyncio and Twisted, for clients and servers.
  • websocketsstars3.3k - A library for building WebSocket servers and clients in Python with a focus on correctness and simplicity.
  • Tornado - Performant web framework and asynchronous networking library.
  • Japronto!stars8.4k - Experimental http toolkit built on top of uvloop and picohttpparser.
  • Starlettestars5.5k - A lightweight ASGI framework/toolkit for building high performance services.
  • uvicornstars3.9k - The lightning-fast ASGI server.
  • FastAPIstars30.8k - A very high performance Python 3.6+ API framework based on type hints. Powered by Starlette and Pydantic.

Message Queues

Libraries to implement applications using message queues.

  • aioamqpstars249 - AMQP implementation using asyncio.
  • pyzmqstars2.8k - Python bindings for ZeroMQ.
  • aiozmqstars360 - Alternative Asyncio integration with ZeroMQ.
  • crossbarstars1.9k - Crossbar.io is a networking platform for distributed and microservice applications.
  • asyncio-natsstars396 - Client for the NATS messaging system.
  • aiokafkastars568 - Client for Apache Kafka.

Database Drivers

Libraries to connect to databases.

  • asyncpgstars4.9k - Fast PostgreSQL Database Client Library for Python/asyncio.
  • asyncpgsastars377 - Asyncpg with sqlalchemy core support.
  • aiopgstars1.1k - Library for accessing a PostgreSQL database.
  • aiomysqlstars1.3k - Library for accessing a MySQL database
  • aioodbcstars213 - Library for accessing a ODBC databases.
  • motorstars1.7k - The async Python driver for MongoDB.
  • aioredisstars1.7k - aio-libs Redis client (PEP 3156).
  • asyncio-redisstars529 - Redis client for Python asyncio (PEP 3156).
  • aiocouchdbstars53 - CouchDB client built on top of aiohttp (asyncio).
  • aioinfluxstars142 - InfluxDB client built on top of aiohttp.
  • aioesstars99 - Asyncio compatible driver for elasticsearch.
  • peewee-asyncstars610 - ORM implementation based on peeweestars8.3k and aiopg.
  • GINOstars2.1k - is a lightweight asynchronous Python ORM based on SQLAlchemy core, with asyncpgstars4.9k dialect.
  • Tortoise ORMstars2k - native multi-backend ORM with Django-like API and easy relations management.
  • Databasesstars2.2k - Async database access for SQLAlchemy core, with support for PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite.

Networking

Libraries to communicate in your network.

  • AsyncSSHstars1.1k - Provides an asynchronous client and server implementation of the SSHv2 protocol.
  • aiodnsstars375 - Simple DNS resolver for asyncio
  • httpxstars6.8k - asynchronous HTTP client for Python 3 with requestsstars45.2k compatible API.

GraphQL

Libraries to build GraphQL servers.

  • Ariadne - Schema-first Python library for implementing GraphQL servers.
  • Tartiflette - Schema-first Python 3.6+ GraphQL engine built on top of libgraphqlparser.

Testing

Libraries to test asyncio based applications.

  • aiomockstars23 - A python mock library that supports async methods.
  • asyncteststars284 - Enhance the standard unittest package with features for testing. asyncio libraries
  • pytest-asynciostars710 - Pytest support for asyncio.
  • aresponsesstars83 - Asyncio http mocking. Similar to the responsesstars3.2k library used for requestsstars45.2k
  • aioresponsesstars285 - Helper for mock/fake web requests in Python aiohttp package.

Alternative Loops

Alternative asyncio loop implementations.

  • uvloopstars7.7k - Ultra fast implementation of asyncio event loop on top of libuv.

Misc

Other awesome asyncio libraries.

  • aiocachestars521 - Cache manager for different backends.
  • aiofilesstars1.5k - File support for asyncio.
  • aiodebugstars47 - A tiny library for monitoring and testing asyncio programs.
  • aiorunstars231 - A run() function that handles all the usual boilerplate for startup and graceful shutdown.
  • aioserialstars79 - A drop-in replacement of pySerialstars2.3k.
  • aiozipkinstars162 - Distributed tracing instrumentation for asyncio with zipkin
  • asgirefstars837 - Backend utils for ASGI to WSGI integration, includes sync_to_async and async_to_sync function wrappers.
  • ruiastars1.4k - An async web scraping micro-framework based on asyncio.

Writings

Documentation, blog posts, and other awesome writing about asyncio.

  • Official asyncio documentation - Asynchronous I/O, event loop, coroutines and tasks.
  • Short well-written intro to asyncio - Generators, Coroutines, Native Coroutines and async/await.
  • AsyncIO for the Working Python Developer - A gentle introduction to asynchronous programming from basic examples working up to URL fetching.
  • Test limits of Python aiohttp - Making 1 million requests with python-aiohttp.
  • ASGI (Asynchronous Server Gateway Interface) - A spiritual successor to WSGI, intended to provide a standard interface between async-capable Python web servers, frameworks, and applications.
  • First Principles Introduction to Asyncio - A no-buzzword first principles introduction to the internal workings of asyncio.
  • Developing and Testing an Asynchronous API with FastAPI and Pytest - This tutorial looks at how to develop and test an asynchronous API with FastAPI using Test-Driven Development (TDD).

Talks

Recordings of awesome talks about asyncio.

  • Topics of Interest (Python Asyncio) | screencast | slides - PyCon Brasil 2015 keynote (David Beazley).
  • Python Asynchronous I/O Walkthrough | blog post - 8-part code walkthrough (Philip Guo).
  • Async/await in Python 3.5 and why it is awesome - EuroPython 2016 (Yury Selivanov).
  • Fear and Awaiting in Async: A Savage Journey to the Heart of the Coroutine Dream | screencast - PyOhio 2016 keynote (David Beazley).
  • Asynchronous Python for the Complete Beginner | slides - PyCon 2017 (Miguel Grinberg).

Alternatives to asyncio

Alternative approaches to async programming in Python, some of which attempt to support some compatibility with asyncio, others are not compatible at all.

  • curiostars3.6k - The coroutine concurrency library.
    • Curio-Asyncio Bridge - basic curio -> asyncio coroutine bridge
  • triostars3.9k - Pythonic async I/O for humans and snake people.
    • trio-asynciostars139 - re-implementation of the asyncio mainloop on top of Trio
